title: Universal clinical-data patterns apply when the relevant fields are present
description: Umbrella rule covering sub-patterns 7A–7P. Apply these patterns whenever the form contains the relevant fields: paired *STDAT/*ENDAT cross-date constraints (start <= end); future-date blocks on start dates; *ENDAT relevance gated on *ONGO status; sequential dates cascade across visits; BMI calculation from height + weight; AE severity/serious logic (severity drives serious-flag default); eligibility fixed-value constraints; physiological range sanity checks; RACE multi-select exclusivity (RACE_OTHER excludes specific choices); optional dose/duration calculations; cross-form value fetch via CF helpers; sex-dependent fields via SEX_CF; and additional patterns 7N–7P. Decomposition into per-sub-rule conventions is Phase B.1c work — see conventions/_audit/OC7_decomposition_plan.md.
rationale: These patterns are universal clinical-trial idioms that recur across study types. Capturing them as an umbrella rule today (rather than 16 separate sub-rules) lets the cascade and prompt-injection layer surface them to Claude during build without blocking on full structured-DSL decomposition. The B.1c decomposition will produce one structured/hybrid convention per sub-letter, enabling per-sub-rule cascade resolution and trainer integration.

applies_when.soft: Form contains fields matching any of the sub-patterns 7A–7P (paired dates, AE severity, eligibility, physiological measurements, RACE, dose/duration, CF cross-form fetch, SEX_CF sex-dependent gating, and related).

effect.soft: Apply the matching sub-rules from 7A–7P. The full prose is preserved in prompts.py RULE OC-7 (lines 266–474). Sub-rules are independent — applying one does not imply applying others. When a sub-rule fires, emit the canonical pattern (constraint expression, relevance gate, calculate row pair, etc.) and add a review_flag.clinical_pattern_applied entry naming the sub-letter.

history.note: Imported from prompts.py RULE OC-7 as an umbrella convention during Phase B.1a per Option 3 of the OC-7 decomposition strategy decision. Full decomposition into 16 sub-conventions (7A–7P) deferred to Phase B.1c — see conventions/_audit/OC7_decomposition_plan.md. Stale duplicates of OC-7 sub-rules exist in skills/edc-builder/references/xlsform-build-rules.md and skills/protocol-analysis/references/xlsform-patterns.md per B.0 finding; deletion of those duplicates is Phase C work.
